export class TradeUpdateParser{constructor(){this._sessionId=0;this._aConfirmed=false;this._bConfirmed=false;this._aSlots=[];this._bSlots=[];}flush(){this._sessionId=0;this._aConfirmed=false;this._bConfirmed=false;this._aSlots=[];this._bSlots=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// Must match TradeUpdateComposer.java
this._sessionId=wrapper.readInt();this._aConfirmed=wrapper.readBoolean();this._bConfirmed=wrapper.readBoolean();const aCount=wrapper.readInt();this._aSlots=this.readSlots(wrapper,aCount);const bCount=wrapper.readInt();this._bSlots=this.readSlots(wrapper,bCount);return true;}readSlots(wrapper,count){const out=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const hasItem=wrapper.readBoolean();if(!hasItem){out.push({hasItem:false});continue;}out.push({hasItem:true,inventoryRowId:wrapper.readInt(),itemId:wrapper.readInt(),name:wrapper.readString(),icon:wrapper.readString(),rarity:wrapper.readString(),type:wrapper.readString(),quantity:wrapper.readInt(),durability:wrapper.readInt(),maxDurability:wrapper.readInt()});}return out;}get sessionId(){return this._sessionId;}get aConfirmed(){return this._aConfirmed;}get bConfirmed(){return this._bConfirmed;}get aSlots(){return this._aSlots;}get bSlots(){return this._bSlots;}}
